decisions.rationale: IR re-read confirms ai_RNbBHYYj (Group_badge_primary_, named SET-07 ui_ref) is rendered with data-bubble-id and dynamic tier text ai_RNbBHYYl; missing child ai_RNbBHYYk is an Icon node not listed in decompose ui_refs. ui_evidence marks ai_RNbBHYYj partial (icon omitted) but criteria_audit AC-2 only requires tier badge ENUM-04 labels — not the Bubble icon leaf. Badge structure and copy satisfy AC-1/AC-2; icon parity is small SettingsSubscriptionTab.tsx polish (~1 Lucide icon + data-bubble-id on ai_RNbBHYYk) batchable with other settings visual-parity deferrals (SET-03 C-1 precedent). No downstream item depends on SET-07.

Code and migration confirm seeded premium row uses price_number 0; loadSubscriptionPlans maps numeric 0 to "$0" before catalog merge. AC-2 scopes plan-cell price to subscription_plan table rows — criteria_audit AC-2 and FV-2 pass (catalog fallback only when table is empty). Showing "Custom" for premium tier_slug with price_number 0 is display-mapping polish aligning DB seed with PLANS catalog semantics, not a gate failure; one-line guard in subscriptionApi.ts on a future pass. Does not block SET-08 or other module items.

loadSubscriptionPlans correctly throws on Supabase select error; SettingsSubscriptionTab catches, toasts, and leaves an empty grid. FV-2 acceptance text covers PLANS catalog fallback when the table returns zero rows — not error-path resilience. Decompose scope and AC-3 do not require offline/unmigrated error fallback; fail-fast throw is consistent with other settings API modules. Optional log-and-return plansFromCatalog() is prototype resilience polish, not a blocker for advance.

Coverage JSON preflight.gaps still lists pre-implementation AC failures although criteria[] now pass at 100%. Valid audit-traceability gap on the coverage artifact only — review and implementation source already document resolved evidence. Low-priority cycle hygiene to refresh cursor-impl-cycle/output/coverage/SET-07-subscription-tab-and-billing.json on next coverage or re-review pass; does not affect subscription tab behavior or advance gates.

summary: 0 fix_now, 4 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, no blockers, all ACs and functional checks pass. Deferred: C-1 tier-badge icon child ai_RNbBHYYk (settings visual-parity batch); C-2 premium price_number 0 → Custom display mapping in loadSubscriptionPlans; C-3 select-error catalog fallback resilience; C-4 stale coverage preflight.gaps (artifact refresh on next pass). ok_to_advance=true, rewrite_required=false.
